title: About EVA 03
wikitext:
[]: About EVA-03             Quote Post by Cypher » Sat Jun 20, 2009 5:16 am http://www.hlj.com/product/KYD01070 Why is this model equipped with an MP-5, riot shield and night stick? Is this the dawn of a new show, "Law and Order: Tokyo 3"? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Jun 20, 2009 10:35 am The shield actually looks pretty cool (methinks it's an energy shield), although the MP5 is clearly an instance of lazy sculpt-reuse. That is pretty lame... Also, why would an Eva need a night stick?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jun 20, 2009 11:52 am 03 is the Eva security unit?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 20, 2009 12:22 pm Cypher wrote: http://www.hlj.com/product/KYD01070 Why is this model equipped with an MP-5, riot shield and night stick? Is this the dawn of a new show, "Law and Order: Tokyo 3"? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Sat Jun 20, 2009 4:52 pm Evamonkey wrote: Why does an Eva weapon need a silencer?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 20, 2009 8:10 pm Orphan Of Darkness wrote: Evamonkey wrote: Why does an Eva weapon need a silencer?

[]:             Quote Post by Taiga_Shinjiro » Sun Jun 28, 2009 6:46 am Orphan Of Darkness wrote: Evamonkey wrote: Why does an Eva weapon need a silencer?
